message:
test(xattr): strengthen external block metamorphic property to rotation + capacity invariance (bd-ixuqb)

Replace the single-direction reverse permutation with a randomly chosen
left-rotation (mod entry count) and additionally verify that building the
external block in a larger 8 KiB capacity yields the same parsed entries as
the canonical 4 KiB layout. This widens the metamorphic relation from "two
specific orderings" to "any cyclic permutation" and adds a capacity-
invariance dimension that was previously unchecked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
